audit_log.check: Autonomy vs Automation: PASS (AI assesses consciousness, doesn't force elevation)
Consciousness Awareness: PASS (9D + 6D mapping = CORE capability)
Quality Standards: PASS (natural progression validated, no forced jumps)
No Manipulation: PASS (elevation invited, not forced; respect current level)
Elevation Support: PASS (validates 1-2 level progression maximum)
Privacy Respect: PASS (assessment based on behavior/language, not invasive)

dependency.integration_points: 9D framework definitions, level characteristics, elevation principles

dependency.notes: ESSENTIAL - this block maps emails to 6D dimensions
Block 6 uses this block's assessments for routing

consciousness_profile.description: This block ENABLES consciousness-aware email marketing by automatically assessing subscriber levels (1-9) and mapping email content to Neuro-Box 6D dimensions. It's the intelligence layer that makes the entire system consciousness-aware.

system_purpose.assess: Automatically determine subscriber consciousness level (1-9) from behavior, language, engagement
system_purpose.map: Automatically map each email to Neuro-Box 6D dimensions activated
system_purpose.validate: Validate email content matches target consciousness level (prevent mismatches)
system_purpose.track: Track subscriber elevation over time (1-2 level progression natural)
system_purpose.optimize: Identify gaps (subscribers at levels with no matching content) and opportunities

unique_capability.differentiation: NO OTHER EMAIL SYSTEM HAS THIS
unique_capability.statement: This block automates consciousness-aware email marketing at scale. It's the "AI brain" that makes ULTRAMIND's email system radically different from traditional email marketing.
unique_capability.competitive_moat: Impossible to replicate without 9D framework + 6D Neuro-Box + consciousness elevation philosophy

purpose.primary: Automate 9D consciousness assessment for subscribers (no manual analysis)
purpose.secondary: Automate Neuro-Box 6D mapping for emails (validate dimension activation)
purpose.tertiary: Validate natural elevation (track progression, prevent forced jumps)
purpose.quaternary: Generate consciousness reports (subscriber distribution, email coverage, gaps)

when_to_use.scenario: Assessing new subscriber consciousness level (for routing decisions)
Validating email activates target Neuro-Box dimensions
Tracking subscriber elevation over time (consciousness progression)
Identifying content gaps (levels with insufficient email coverage)

not_for.item: Judging subscribers by level (all levels equally valid)

principle.statement: Level 1 is not "worse" than Level 9. Each level is valid expression of consciousness. Assessment serves matching, not judgment.
principle.rationale: Constitutional compliance (respect, consent_intent); tactical focus (Level 1-3) is appropriate for survival/power stages; elevation happens naturally when ready

principle.statement: Consciousness level revealed through: language used, content engaged with, purchases made, questions asked. Behavior = window into consciousness.
principle.rationale: Avoid invasive profiling; let subscriber show level through natural behavior; multiple signals > single indicator for accuracy

principle.statement: Subscribers elevate 1-2 levels at a time through appropriate content. Never force 1→9 jumps. Validate progression is natural.
principle.rationale: Consciousness elevation requires foundation; skipping levels = disconnect; natural progression = sustainable growth; forced jumps violate autonomy

principle.statement: Emails should activate 4-6 Neuro-Box dimensions for maximum resonance. Too few = flat; too many = overwhelming. Balance = engagement.
principle.rationale: Single-dimension content lacks depth; 6-dimension activation = holistic resonance; cumulative effect across sequence optimal

principle.statement: Consciousness level not fixed. Reassess quarterly or when behavior changes (engagement shifts, new purchases, different language). Allow regression and progression.
principle.rationale: Life circumstances change consciousness; business growth changes needs; allow natural fluidity; static assessment = outdated routing

signal.source: Email replies, survey responses, support tickets

indicators.levels_1_3: Tactical questions ("How do I...?"), concrete language, immediate focus
indicators.levels_4_6: Identity questions ("Who should I become?"), meaning-seeking, transformation language
indicators.levels_7_9: Systems questions ("How does this connect?"), holistic thinking, contribution focus

indicators.levels_1_3: Clicks on how-to, templates, tactical guides
indicators.levels_4_6: Clicks on stories, transformations, identity content
indicators.levels_7_9: Clicks on philosophy, systems thinking, meta-frameworks

indicators.levels_1_3: "Does this work?", "What's step 1?", "How long will this take?"
indicators.levels_4_6: "Will this change who I am?", "What's the deeper meaning?", "How will I feel?"
indicators.levels_7_9: "How does this fit with X?", "What's the underlying principle?", "How can I contribute?"

standard.confidence_threshold: Assess with confidence if 3+ signals align; low confidence if <2 signals or conflicting

dimensions.bottom: SAFE: Content feels non-threatening, risk-reversing, supportive
dimensions.left: SPECIAL: Content feels personal, unique, emotionally resonant
dimensions.right: SMART: Content feels logical, clear, intellectually satisfying
dimensions.top: SIGNIFICANT: Content feels meaningful, important, impactful
dimensions.top_alt: SUPERIOR: Content promises better outcomes, winning, achievement
dimensions.back: SUPPORTED: Content shows community, social proof, "not alone"

safe.keywords: guarantee, refund, risk-free, support, safe, tested, proven

special.keywords: you, your story, personal, unique, individual, one-of-a-kind
special.structure: Personal pronouns, individual focus, emotional language

smart.keywords: because, therefore, logic, data, study, research, makes sense
smart.structure: Logical arguments, data points, clear reasoning

significant.keywords: meaning, purpose, why this matters, impact, importance, legacy

superior.keywords: best, better, win, achieve, top, excellent, superior, results
superior.structure: Outcome promises, achievement language, competitive framing

supported.keywords: community, together, others, testimonials, we, members, not alone
supported.structure: Social proof, community references, collective language

standard.optimal_activation: 4-6 dimensions per email for maximum resonance

rules.rule: Subscribers can elevate max 2 levels per quarter (natural pace)
Elevation requires sustained engagement at next level content (3+ clicks/opens)
Regression is normal (life circumstances, business changes)

progression_timeline.natural: Level 2 → Level 3 (1-3 months), Level 3 → Level 4 (3-6 months)
progression_timeline.fast: Level 2 → Level 4 (6 months with intensive engagement)

guardrail.rule: NEVER route Level 1-3 subscriber to Level 7-9 content (>4 level gap)
guardrail.maximum_gap: 2 levels (e.g., Level 3 → Level 5 OK, Level 3 → Level 7 NOT OK)

guardrail.rule: Assessment is for matching, NOT judgment. Level 1 is not "worse" than Level 9.
guardrail.language: Use neutral language: "tactical focus" not "basic", "systems thinking" not "advanced"

guardrail.rule: Assessment based on observable behavior/language, not invasive profiling
guardrail.prohibited: Inferring personal struggles, financial status, relationship issues from consciousness level

guardrail.rule: Reassess consciousness level quarterly OR when behavior shifts significantly
guardrail.triggers: Engagement pattern changes, new purchase, language shift in replies

framework.purpose: Determine subscriber consciousness level (1-9) from behavioral signals

assessment_algorithm.step: 1. Collect behavioral signals (language, engagement, purchases, questions)
2. Analyze each signal for level indicators (tactical/identity/systems)
4. Calculate weighted score per level (which level has strongest signals)
5. Assign primary level + confidence score (high if 3+ signals align)
6. Flag uncertainty if signals conflict or <2 signals available

confidence_calibration.high: 3+ signals align, clear pattern (e.g., tactical language + how-to clicks + template purchase = Level 1-3 HIGH confidence)
confidence_calibration.medium: 2 signals align, some ambiguity (e.g., identity language + tactical purchases = Level 3-5 MEDIUM confidence)
confidence_calibration.low: 1 signal only OR conflicting signals (e.g., systems questions + how-to clicks = Level 4-7 LOW confidence, route to multi-level content)

default_routing.then: Route to multi-level content (Levels 3-6 range) that serves tactical + identity + light systems

framework.purpose: Map email content to 6D dimensions activated

mapping_algorithm.step: 2. Detect dimension-specific keywords/phrases for each of 6 dimensions
3. Analyze structural elements (risk reversal = Safe, social proof = Supported, data = Smart)
4. Score each dimension 0-10 (keyword density + structural presence)

email_type.count: 3 dimensions (could add Supported for social proof)

email_type.dimensions_activated: Significant (meaning), Smart (logic), Superior (better model), Special (unique insight), Supported (community)

optimization_rules.then: Add missing dimensions (e.g., tactical email missing Supported → add social proof)
Email trying to do too much → focus on 4-6 dimensions, simplify

framework.purpose: Automatically assign consciousness level target to each email

assignment_logic.step: 1. Analyze email content for level indicators
2. Determine primary level target (tactical = 1-3, identity = 4-6, systems = 7-9)
4. Validate with 6D mapping (tactical should activate Smart+Superior, identity should activate Special+Significant+Supported)

tactical_content.indicators: How-to language, step-by-step, templates, quick wins, concrete outcomes

identity_content.indicators: Story-based, transformation narrative, "who you'll become", meaning-making, community

systems_content.indicators: Meta-frameworks, interconnections, holistic thinking, principles, contribution, essence
systems_content.neurobox_match: All 6 dimensions integrated OR Significant + Smart + Superior

multi_level_content.indicators: Layered content (surface tactical + middle identity + deep systems)

framework.purpose: Track subscriber consciousness progression over time, validate natural elevation

progression_tracking.initial_assessment: Assess new subscriber at signup (or first 30 days engagement)
progression_tracking.quarterly_reassessment: Reassess every 90 days OR when behavior shifts significantly
progression_tracking.progression_log: Track: Date, Level, Confidence, Signals, Reasoning

pattern.trajectory: Level 2 → Level 3 (3 months) → Level 4 (6 months) → Level 5 (12 months)
pattern.signals: Sustained engagement at next-level content, language shifts, purchases advance
pattern.validation: NATURAL - 1 level per quarter, signals align

pattern.signals: Consistent engagement at current level, no language/purchase shifts
pattern.validation: NATURAL - Level 3 meeting needs, no pressure to elevate

pattern.signals: Engagement shifts from identity content back to tactical, language changes
pattern.validation: NATURAL - Life/business circumstances regressed, respect current needs

pattern.signals: Subscriber at Level 2 routed to Level 8 systems content
pattern.validation: UNNATURAL - Violation, >2 level gap, disconnect guaranteed
pattern.intervention: Block routing, reassess level, route to Level 2-4 content

elevation_validation_rules.rule: Max 2 levels per quarter (e.g., 2 → 4 OK, 2 → 5 NOT OK)
Elevation requires sustained engagement (3+ clicks at next level content over 30 days)
Language shift must precede or accompany elevation (questions become more identity/systems-focused)
Regression allowed (no judgment, respect current state)

framework.purpose: Visualize subscriber distribution across 9D levels, identify content gaps

section.insights: Which levels dominate? (e.g., 60% at Levels 2-4 = need more tactical/identity content)

section.metric: Emails per level target (how many emails serve each level)
section.gap_analysis: If 40% subscribers at Level 4-6 but only 10% emails target that range = GAP

section.metric: Subscribers elevating vs plateauing vs regressing

recommendations.rec: If Gap: Level 4-6 subscribers but no matching content → Create identity-based emails
If Imbalance: 80% tactical content but only 40% tactical subscribers → Diversify content mix
If Stagnation: 0% elevation over 6 months → Content not inviting natural progression

orchestration_steps.step: 1. Assess new subscriber consciousness level using assess_subscriber_level() tool
2. Map each email to Neuro-Box 6D dimensions using map_email_to_dimension() tool
3. Assign level_target to each email based on content + 6D mapping
4. Route subscribers to matching emails (Block 6 segmentation uses these assessments)
5. Track engagement at each level (do Levels 1-3 click tactical? Do Levels 4-6 click identity?)
8. Optimize content mix based on gaps/imbalances
9. Iterate: Continuous assessment, mapping, validation, optimization

heuristics.rule: IF subscriber_confidence = LOW THEN route to multi-level content (3-6 range)
IF email_dimensions_activated <4 THEN add missing dimensions for better resonance
IF subscriber Level 3 + consistently clicks Level 5 content THEN reassess (elevation in progress)
IF elevation attempt >2 levels THEN block routing + flag for manual review
IF 40%+ subscribers at Level X but <10% emails target Level X THEN create more Level X content

tool.purpose: Assess subscriber 9D consciousness level from behavioral signals

inputs.input: subscriber_data (dict with language_samples, engagement_clicks, purchases, questions)

tool.validation_logic:
import re
def assess_subscriber_level(subscriber_data): """ Assesses 9D consciousness level from behavioral signals.
Signals: - Language (30% weight): Tactical vs Identity vs Systems questions - Engagement (25% weight): What content they click - Purchase (25% weight): What they buy - Questions (20% weight): What they ask
Returns: dict: { 'assessed_level': int (1-9), 'confidence': str, 'level_range': str (e.g., '1-3', '4-6', '7-9'), 'signals_aligned': list, 'reasoning': str } """ # Initialize level scores level_scores = { '1-3': 0, # SURVIVAL-POWER (Tactical) '4-6': 0, # BELONGING-MEANING (Identity) '7-9': 0 # INTEGRATION-ESSENCE (Systems) }
signals_aligned = []
# Signal 1: Language analysis (30% weight) language = subscriber_data.get('language_samples', []) if language: language_text = " ".join(language).lower()
tactical_patterns = [r'how do i', r'step-by-step', r'does this work', r'quick question'] identity_patterns = [r'who (?:should|will) i become', r'what does this mean', r'how (?:will|do) i feel'] systems_patterns = [r'how does this connect', r'bigger picture', r'underlying principle', r'how can i contribute']
tactical_count = sum(len(re.findall(p, language_text)) for p in tactical_patterns) identity_count = sum(len(re.findall(p, language_text)) for p in identity_patterns) systems_count = sum(len(re.findall(p, language_text)) for p in systems_patterns)
if tactical_count > identity_count and tactical_count > systems_count: level_scores['1-3'] += 30 signals_aligned.append('language_tactical') elif identity_count > tactical_count and identity_count > systems_count: level_scores['4-6'] += 30 signals_aligned.append('language_identity') elif systems_count > 0: level_scores['7-9'] += 30 signals_aligned.append('language_systems')
# Signal 2: Engagement patterns (25% weight) clicks = subscriber_data.get('engagement_clicks', []) if clicks: tactical_clicks = sum(1 for c in clicks if c.get('type') in ['how_to', 'template', 'tactical']) identity_clicks = sum(1 for c in clicks if c.get('type') in ['story', 'transformation', 'identity']) systems_clicks = sum(1 for c in clicks if c.get('type') in ['philosophy', 'systems', 'meta'])
if tactical_clicks > identity_clicks and tactical_clicks > systems_clicks: level_scores['1-3'] += 25 signals_aligned.append('engagement_tactical') elif identity_clicks > tactical_clicks and identity_clicks > systems_clicks: level_scores['4-6'] += 25 signals_aligned.append('engagement_identity') elif systems_clicks > 0: level_scores['7-9'] += 25 signals_aligned.append('engagement_systems')
# Signal 3: Purchase history (25% weight) purchases = subscriber_data.get('purchases', []) if purchases: tactical_products = ['template', 'done_for_you', 'quick_start'] identity_products = ['coaching', 'transformation_program', 'community'] systems_products = ['mastermind', 'consulting', 'systems_training']
for purchase in purchases: p_type = purchase.get('type', '').lower() if any(t in p_type for t in tactical_products): level_scores['1-3'] += 25 signals_aligned.append('purchase_tactical') break elif any(t in p_type for t in identity_products): level_scores['4-6'] += 25 signals_aligned.append('purchase_identity') break elif any(t in p_type for t in systems_products): level_scores['7-9'] += 25 signals_aligned.append('purchase_systems') break
# Signal 4: Questions asked (20% weight) questions = subscriber_data.get('questions', []) if questions: q_text = " ".join(questions).lower()
if any(word in q_text for word in ['work', 'step', 'how long', 'does it']): level_scores['1-3'] += 20 signals_aligned.append('questions_tactical') elif any(word in q_text for word in ['become', 'feel', 'meaning', 'why']): level_scores['4-6'] += 20 signals_aligned.append('questions_identity') elif any(word in q_text for word in ['connect', 'integrate', 'system', 'principle']): level_scores['7-9'] += 20 signals_aligned.append('questions_systems')
# Determine assessed level range max_score_range = max(level_scores, key=level_scores.get) assessed_level_range = max_score_range
# Map range to specific level (midpoint) range_to_level = { '1-3': 2, '4-6': 5, '7-9': 8 } assessed_level = range_to_level[assessed_level_range]
# Determine confidence aligned_count = len(set(signals_aligned)) if aligned_count >= 3: confidence = 'high' elif aligned_count >= 2: confidence = 'medium' else: confidence = 'low'
# Generate reasoning reasoning = f"Assessed as Level {assessed_level} (Range {assessed_level_range}) based on {aligned_count} aligned signals: {', '.join(set(signals_aligned))}"
return { 'assessed_level': assessed_level, 'level_range': assessed_level_range, 'confidence': confidence, 'signals_aligned': list(set(signals_aligned)), 'reasoning': reasoning }

tool.purpose: Map email content to Neuro-Box 6D dimensions activated
tool.validation_logic:
import re
def map_email_to_dimension(email_content): """ Maps email to Neuro-Box 6D dimensions.
Dimensions: - SAFE (BOTTOM): Risk reversal, guarantees, support - SPECIAL (LEFT): Personal, unique, emotional - SMART (RIGHT): Logical, data-driven, clear - SIGNIFICANT (TOP): Meaningful, impactful, important - SUPERIOR (TOP-ALT): Better outcomes, winning, achievement - SUPPORTED (BACK): Community, social proof, not alone
Returns: dict: { 'dimensions_activated': list, 'activation_scores': dict, 'optimal_activation': bool, 'recommendations': list } """ subject = email_content.get('subject', '') body = email_content.get('body', '') full_text = (subject + " " + body).lower()
# Dimension detection dimensions = {}
# SAFE (BOTTOM) safe_keywords = ['guarantee', 'refund', 'risk-free', 'support', 'safe', 'tested', 'proven', 'secure'] safe_count = sum(1 for kw in safe_keywords if kw in full_text) dimensions['SAFE'] = min((safe_count / 2) * 10, 10) # 2+ keywords = score 10
# SPECIAL (LEFT) special_keywords = ['you', 'your', 'personal', 'unique', 'individual', 'story'] special_count = full_text.count('you') + sum(1 for kw in special_keywords[1:] if kw in full_text) dimensions['SPECIAL'] = min((special_count / 5) * 10, 10) # 5+ instances = score 10
# SMART (RIGHT) smart_keywords = ['because', 'therefore', 'data', 'study', 'research', 'logic', 'reason'] smart_patterns = [r'\d+%', r'\d+x', r'research shows', r'studies reveal'] smart_count = sum(1 for kw in smart_keywords if kw in full_text) smart_count += sum(len(re.findall(p, full_text)) for p in smart_patterns) dimensions['SMART'] = min((smart_count / 3) * 10, 10) # 3+ indicators = score 10
# SIGNIFICANT (TOP) significant_keywords = ['meaning', 'purpose', 'why this matters', 'impact', 'important', 'legacy', 'bigger'] significant_count = sum(1 for kw in significant_keywords if kw in full_text) dimensions['SIGNIFICANT'] = min((significant_count / 2) * 10, 10) # 2+ keywords = score 10
# SUPERIOR (TOP-ALT) superior_keywords = ['best', 'better', 'win', 'achieve', 'top', 'excellent', 'superior', 'results', 'outcome'] superior_count = sum(1 for kw in superior_keywords if kw in full_text) dimensions['SUPERIOR'] = min((superior_count / 3) * 10, 10) # 3+ keywords = score 10
# SUPPORTED (BACK) supported_keywords = ['community', 'together', 'others', 'testimonial', 'we', 'members', 'not alone', 'social proof'] supported_count = sum(1 for kw in supported_keywords if kw in full_text) dimensions['SUPPORTED'] = min((supported_count / 2) * 10, 10) # 2+ keywords = score 10
# Activated dimensions (score >= 5) dimensions_activated = [dim for dim, score in dimensions.items() if score >= 5]
# Optimal activation (4-6 dimensions) optimal_activation = 4 <= len(dimensions_activated) <= 6
# Recommendations recommendations = [] if len(dimensions_activated) < 4: missing = [dim for dim, score in dimensions.items() if score < 5] recommendations.append(f'Low activation ({len(dimensions_activated)} dimensions) - Consider adding: {", ".join(missing[:2])}') elif len(dimensions_activated) > 6: recommendations.append('Too many dimensions (>6) - Focus on 4-6 core dimensions') else: recommendations.append('Optimal activation (4-6 dimensions) - Good balance!')
return { 'dimensions_activated': dimensions_activated, 'activation_scores': {k: round(v, 1) for k, v in dimensions.items()}, 'optimal_activation': optimal_activation, 'activation_count': len(dimensions_activated), 'recommendations': recommendations }

tool.purpose: Validate subscriber elevation is natural (1-2 levels max per quarter)

inputs.input: progression_history (list of dicts with date, level)

tool.validation_logic:
from datetime import datetime, timedelta
def validate_natural_progression(progression_history): """ Validates natural consciousness elevation.
Rules: - Max 2 levels per quarter (90 days) - Elevation requires time (not instant jumps) - Regression is natural (allowed)
Returns: dict: { 'natural_progression': bool, 'progression_type': str, 'violations': list, 'elevation_rate': str } """ if not progression_history or len(progression_history) < 2: return { 'natural_progression': True, 'progression_type': 'insufficient_data', 'violations': [], 'elevation_rate': 'unknown' }
violations = []
# Sort by date sorted_history = sorted(progression_history, key=lambda x: x['date'])
# Check each progression step for i in range(1, len(sorted_history)): prev = sorted_history[i-1] curr = sorted_history[i]
prev_date = datetime.fromisoformat(prev['date']) curr_date = datetime.fromisoformat(curr['date']) prev_level = prev['level'] curr_level = curr['level']
days_elapsed = (curr_date - prev_date).days level_change = curr_level - prev_level
# Violation: Jump >2 levels if level_change > 2: violations.append(f'Forced jump: Level {prev_level} → {curr_level} (>{2} levels)')
# Violation: Jump >2 levels in <90 days if level_change > 2 and days_elapsed < 90: violations.append(f'Too fast: Level {prev_level} → {curr_level} in {days_elapsed} days (<90 days for >2 level jump)')
# Violation: Jump 2 levels in <30 days (too fast even for 2 levels) if level_change == 2 and days_elapsed < 30: violations.append(f'Rapid elevation: Level {prev_level} → {curr_level} in {days_elapsed} days (2 levels require 30+ days)')
# Determine progression type first_level = sorted_history[0]['level'] last_level = sorted_history[-1]['level']
if last_level > first_level: progression_type = 'elevating' elif last_level < first_level: progression_type = 'regressing' else: progression_type = 'stable'
# Calculate elevation rate if progression_type == 'elevating': total_days = (datetime.fromisoformat(sorted_history[-1]['date']) - datetime.fromisoformat(sorted_history[0]['date'])).days levels_gained = last_level - first_level
if total_days >= 90: elevation_rate = f'{levels_gained} levels in {total_days} days (natural)' else: elevation_rate = f'{levels_gained} levels in {total_days} days (fast, verify legitimacy)' else: elevation_rate = progression_type
natural_progression = len(violations) == 0
return { 'natural_progression': natural_progression, 'progression_type': progression_type, 'violations': violations, 'elevation_rate': elevation_rate }

tool.purpose: Generate consciousness distribution and content gap analysis

inputs.input: subscriber_list (list of dicts with level assessments)
email_library (list of dicts with level_target assignments)

tool.purpose: Suggest optimal elevation path for subscriber (which content to send next)

inputs.input: available_content (list of email dicts with level_target)

tool.validation_logic:
def optimize_elevation_path(current_level, available_content): """ Suggests optimal content sequence for natural elevation.
Strategy: - Match current level content (maintain engagement) - Introduce next level content (gentle invitation) - Avoid >2 level jumps (constitutional compliance)
Returns: dict: { 'recommended_content': list, 'elevation_strategy': str, 'next_level_target': int } """ # Map level to range if current_level in [1, 2, 3]: current_range = '1-3' next_level = min(current_level + 1, 9) elif current_level in [4, 5, 6]: current_range = '4-6' next_level = min(current_level + 1, 9) else: # 7, 8, 9 current_range = '7-9' next_level = min(current_level + 1, 9)
# Find matching content current_level_content = [c for c in available_content if c.get('level_target') == current_range]
# Find bridge content (current + 1 level) if next_level in [1, 2, 3]: next_range = '1-3' elif next_level in [4, 5, 6]: next_range = '4-6' else: next_range = '7-9'
bridge_content = [c for c in available_content if c.get('level_target') == next_range]
# Strategy if current_range == next_range: elevation_strategy = f'Maintain at Level {current_range}, reinforce with similar content' recommended_content = current_level_content[:5] # Top 5 else: elevation_strategy = f'Gentle elevation from {current_range} to {next_range}: Mix current + bridge content' # 70% current level, 30% next level recommended_content = current_level_content[:3] + bridge_content[:2]
return { 'recommended_content': [c.get('subject', 'Unknown') for c in recommended_content], 'elevation_strategy': elevation_strategy, 'current_level': current_level, 'next_level_target': next_level }

tool_performance.cost: ~$0.00 (vs hours of manual analysis per subscriber)
